message.content:
@startuml
actor User
participant LoginPartialView
participant MicrosoftIdentityLibrary
participant HomeController
database StudieTipsDB

User -> LoginPartialView : clicks on "Register"
LoginPartialView -> MicrosoftIdentityLibrary : sends action
MicrosoftIdentityLibrary --> LoginPartialView : Creates RegisterView

loop [While user not registered]
  User -> LoginPartialView : inputs e-mail, password and password confirmation
  alt [E-mail is invalid]
    MicrosoftIdentityLibrary --> LoginPartialView : Display 'The Email field is not a valid e-mail address'.
  else [Password is less than 6 or greater than 100 characters]
    MicrosoftIdentityLibrary --> LoginPartialView : Display 'The password must be at least 6 and at max 100 chracters long.'
  else [Password and confirmation password do not match]
    MicrosoftIdentityLibrary --> LoginPartialView : Display 'The password and confirmation password do not match'
  end

  User -> MicrosoftIdentityLibrary : User clicks register button
  alt [Password does not contain at least one symbol]
    MicrosoftIdentityLibrary --> LoginPartialView : Display 'Passwords must have at least one non alphanumeric character'.
  else [Passord does not contain at least one digit]
    MicrosoftIdentityLibrary --> LoginPartialView : Display 'Passwords must have at least one digit ('0'-'9')'.
  else [Password does not contain uppercase letters]
    MicrosoftIdentityLibrary --> LoginPartialView : Display 'Passwords must have at least one uppercase ('A'-'Z').'.
  else [Password does not contain 4 different characters]
    MicrosoftIdentityLibrary --> LoginPartialView : Display 'Passwords must use at least 4 different characters.'
  else [E-mail is already in use]
    MicrosoftIdentityLibrary --> LoginPartialView : Display 'Username 'E-mail' is already taken.'
  end

  MicrosoftIdentityLibrary -> StudieTipsDB : Creates user with e-mail and password
end

MicrosoftIdentityLibrary -> HomeController : returns action
HomeController --> HomeController : Create home view

@enduml
